Combine mitochondrial-targeted gene therapy and chemotherapy to treat triple-negative breast cancer

evidence_entities.text: cmLumiOpto, which directly disrupts mitochondrial membrane potential and induces cancer cell death
combination therapy achieved a 95–100% reduction in tumor burden
suppressed patient-derived xenograft growth, and inhibited metastasis
CD276 mRNA levels are significantly higher in TNBC tissues compared to normal breast tissue
23% of cases exhibited high CD276 expression, 44% had moderate expression

properties.note: Olaparib is a specific PARP inhibitor
